block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Salesforce announced its fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday that surpassed market expectations, and the company provided a positive outlook for the year ahead. The CEO and co-founder, Marc Benioff, outlined the company's focus on boosting profitability by reducing staff, cutting down on real-estate expenses, and eliminating a committee that focuses on mergers and acquisitions.
block_07: On February 28th, First Solar released its earnings report for the quarter. The solar cell manufacturer outperformed analysts' consensus estimates by posting earnings per share of ($0.07), beating the anticipated value of ($0.18) by $0.11.
block_10: Tesla shares plummeted by over 5% following the Investor Day hosted on March 1st. Although the presentation provided a comprehensive review of the company's previous accomplishments and future aspirations, CEO Elon Musk was criticized for not providing sufficient details about any new products or services.
